highlights.description: Batteries-included voice pipeline framework for Go with unified STT and TTS interfaces
Provider registry pattern - consumers only need to import omnivoice, not individual provider packages
Four providers registered: OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Deepgram, and Twilio

added.description: Unified `STTClient` and `TTSClient` interfaces for speech-to-text and text-to-speech
`providers/all` package for importing all providers with a single import
Provider registry with `RegisterTTSProvider` and `RegisterSTTProvider` for self-registration
`GetTTSProvider(name, opts...)` and `GetSTTProvider(name, opts...)` for runtime provider creation
Streaming support for real-time transcription and synthesis

build.description: GitHub Actions workflows for CI, linting, and CodeQL security scanning
golangci-lint configuration with standard Go linting rules
Dependabot configuration for automated dependency updates

documentation.description: README with quick start guide, usage examples, and provider compatibility table
Language codes reference table with BCP-47 examples
